title: helmiopsis rigida subsp. parvifolia
intro: Helmiopsis rigida subsp. parvifolia, also known as a species of flowering plant, is a member of the Asteraceae family and is native to tropical Africa. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, thanks to its expectorant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
